og_images.headline_verbatim: Your existing decks, turned into training in hours.
A library you can use today and a pipeline that ingests your own decks.
Five tiers from S$0 to S$299 platform plus S$2.99 per user.
Built by an operator, used in-house first.

og_images.note: Internal — uses navy ground + 'INTERNAL · NOT FOR SHARING' badge. Page is noindex; OG variant exists only so accidental share surfaces an 'internal' visual.

og_regeneration_log.reason: BYO-deck / reverse-engineering repositioning + new S$2.99/user + five-tier pricing. First-pass OG images shipped with prior 'Singapore-built learning for HR' / 'Team S$12/user' headlines that no longer matched the recalibrated copy.json or HTML meta tags.

favicon_source.crop_strategy: Cropped just the navy 'person-icon' mark (centre of wordmark, x=515..628, y=81..208 in the 1024x354 source) onto a cream square — wordmark itself is illegible at 16x16, so the mark alone is used for square favicons.
favicon_source.svg_strategy: Synthesised SVG of the person-icon mark with prefers-color-scheme media query so dark-mode tabs flip the background to navy and the mark to cream.

csp_overrides: connect-src: added https://formspree.io to permit POSTs from /contact.html form to Formspree's submission endpoint.
form-action: added https://formspree.io for the same reason (HTML form action attribute target).
csp_policy_summary: Baseline default-src 'self' with Google Fonts + Formspree widenings. No third-party analytics, no embedded iframes, no Supabase client. Re-audit if any new third-party script is added.

credential_chip_logos.rationale: Agent 4 left the WSG / IHRP / SkillsFuture / MOM-EA / TPGateway credential chips as text-only pills on /index.html. Sourcing clean trademark SVGs for each accreditor is a brand-permissions task (each agency restricts logo usage); Agent 6 leaves the text treatment in place rather than ship rasterized scrapes. Flagged for Agent 7 / Derrick to procure approved SVGs before next brand refresh.

social_meta_validated.note: Validators run post-deploy once the site is reachable at https://derrick-pixel.github.io/elitez-lms-site/. Agent 7 (QA) to confirm.

schema_validation_note: Local JSON parse check passed cleanly for all 23 JSON-LD blocks across 7 indexed pages (home, product, pricing, for-whom, about, contact, plus admin BreadcrumbList). Google Rich Results Test / Schema.org Validator / Bing Markup Validator runs post-deploy by Agent 7.
